services.name: Dinner reservations
services.description: Tables for 2-8, walk-ins welcome for the bar

services.name: Private events
services.description: Semi-private dining room for up to 20 guests

services.name: Catering
services.description: Off-site catering for corporate and private events

faqs.question: Do you have vegetarian options?
faqs.answer: Yes, about a third of the menu is vegetarian, and we can adapt several dishes to be vegan on request.

faqs.question: Is there parking?
faqs.answer: Street parking on Ossington, plus a public lot one block north.

faqs.question: Do you take walk-ins?
faqs.answer: Yes for the bar and patio, but the dining room is reservation-only on weekends.

promotion.headline: Chef's tasting menu, Sunday–Tuesday
promotion.details: 5-course tasting menu with wine pairing available Sunday through Tuesday evenings.
